sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110004" key="u(yixai/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ-χαίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n110004.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βαθυχαίτης</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg002.perseus-grc1:4:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.172</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐρυχαίτης.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
